commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human maintainer/security review is needed because the safe fix depends on the numeric-ID repair or migration strategy, and the contributor still needs to provide real affected-path proof.; Needs attention: The diff weakens the GitHub account gate/profile trust boundary by adding mutable-login lookups for identity-sensitive checks.; Review finding: [P1] Preserve immutable GitHub identity lookups — convex/lib/... (sha=86cb09a3c8168136514f19416650df242ce82c8f)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes GitHub account age/profile lookup to accept numeric providerAccountId values or GitHub-login-shaped strings, with focused unit tests for the username path.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: on current main a username-format providerAccountId reaches assertGitHubNumericId and throws before fetch. I did not run a live publish, but the code path and linked reports show the failure shape clearly.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer/security review is needed because the safe fix depends on the numeric-ID repair or migration strategy, and the contributor still needs to provide real affected-path proof.

target.title: fix: handle username-format providerAccountId in GitHub account lookup
target.body:
## Summary

- What changed: Replaced assertGitHubNumericId in [convex/lib/githubAccount.ts](https://github.com/dmcrider/clawhub/blob/claude/pr-1-review-validation-5jgxX/convex/lib/githubAccount.ts) with buildGitHubUserUrl, which routes numeric IDs to /user/:id and valid GitHub logins to /users/:login instead of hard-failing on non-numeric values.
- Why: Convex Auth occasionally stores the GitHub login (e.g. stokkan-6ith) as providerAccountId instead of the numeric ID (282699917). The previous guard threw unconditionally for any non-numeric value, blocking skill publishing and profile sync for those accounts.

## Linked Issue

- Closes #2446 
- Related #2466 #2464 #2462 #2461 #2459 #2456 #2451 #2436 

## Screenshots

For website/UI changes, attach screenshots or recordings from the real app. Include mobile/narrow views when layout changes.

- [x] `N/A`

## Behavioural Proof

Describe how you verified the user-facing behavior. For UI changes, include the path tested and what changed on screen. For backend/API changes, include the request, command, or scenario that proves the behavior.

- [x] `N/A`

## Security / Trust Impact

- [ ] No security/trust impact
- [x] Security/trust impact explained

The numeric-ID path is unchanged (immune to username-swap). The username path is a fallback for accounts where the numeric ID was never stored — the API call resolves whoever currently holds that login. This is consistent with how the account was originally linked and does not expand the trust boundary.

## Data / Deploy Impact

- [x] No data/deploy impact
- [ ] Data/deploy impact explained

## Verification

- [x] `bun run ci:static`
- [x] Focused tests for touched behavior: 20 unit tests in [convex/lib/githubAccount.test.ts](https://github.com/dmcrider/clawhub/blob/claude/pr-1-review-validation-5jgxX/convex/lib/githubAccount.test.ts) — covers numeric ID, hyphenated username, plain alphanumeric username, trailing-hyphen rejection, and syncGitHubProfile username path. All pass.
- [x] `bun run ci:unit` or `N/A` for docs/config-only:
- [ ] Broader gate when required (`ci:types-build`, `ci:packages`, `ci:e2e-http`, `ci:playwright-smoke`, `test:pw:local-auth`, `proof:ui`):
- [ ] Other:
target.author: dmcrider
